title: Clinical Data Coordinator
description: We're hiring a Clinical Data Coordinator at BioNTech. This is an exciting opportunity to join our innovative, fast-paced, science-driven team and make a direct impact on our mission. If you have 0-2 years years of experience and are passionate about Biotechnology, we'd love to hear from you.
responsibilities: Manage clinical trial documentation ensuring regulatory and protocol compliance
Collect, verify, and validate patient data from study sites
Monitor adverse events and safety reporting to ensure patient welfare
Coordinate with principal investigators and research sites on enrollment and data collection
Maintain regulatory binders and ensure study documentation completeness
Provide regular communication to study sites regarding protocol requirements and updates

requirements.education: Associate's degree or high school diploma with healthcare background

benefits: Flexible work schedule and remote work options
Wellness programs and gym membership reimbursement
